name: Chocolate Cappucino Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs, butter, sugar, and cinnamon. Mix well.
2. Butter the sides and bottom of an 8-inch springform pan. Press the crumb mixture into the pan. Set aside.
3. Beat the cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add sugar, mixing until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating on low speed until very smooth.
5. Melt chocolate with cream over boiling water, stirring until smooth. Add to the cheese mixture, blending well.
6. Add sour cream, salt, coffee, liqueur, and vanilla, beating until smooth.
7. Turn into prepared pan. Bake in the center of the oven at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until sides are puffed. The center will be soft but will firm up as it chills.
8. Turn off the oven; leave the door ajar. Allow the cake to cool in the oven for 45 minutes.
9. Cover and chill for 12 hours. Remove the sides of the pan.
10. Whip cream with powdered sugar and liqueur. Garnish the cake with mounds of whipped cream and chocolate leaves or chocolate espresso beans (optional).
